user.title: Geberit AquaClean
user.description: Enter the BLE MAC address of your AquaClean device. Optionally configure an ESPHome Bluetooth proxy if the device is not in range of this machine.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AquaClean device. Check the MAC address, ensure the device is powered on and in BLE range, and verify any ESPHome proxy settings. Also make sure no other device (e.g. the Geberit Home App or the standalone bridge) is connected via Bluetooth — the AquaClean only advertises when no BLE connection is active.

abort.already_configured: This AquaClean device is already configured.

init.title: Geberit AquaClean — Settings
init.description: Update the device address or proxy settings. A connection test is performed on save.

data.esphome_host: ESPHome Proxy Host (leave empty for local BLE)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AquaClean device. Check the MAC address, ensure the device is powered on and in BLE range, and verify any ESPHome proxy settings. Also make sure no other device (e.g. the Geberit Home App or the standalone bridge) is connected via Bluetooth — the AquaClean only advertises when no BLE connection is active.
